delete_account.title: アカウントを削除
delete_account.confirm_question: アカウントを削除しますか？
delete_account.confirm_desc_1: 確認ボタンを押すと、アカウントは
delete_account.confirm_desc_3: ロックされ、30日後に完全に削除されます。
delete_account.error_failed: アカウントの削除中にエラーが発生しました。もう一度お試しください。
delete_account.success_title: アカウントが正常にロックされました！
delete_account.success_desc: ご利用いただきありがとうございます。4秒後に自動的にログアウトします...
delete_account.verify_password: Please verify your password to continue.
delete_account.enter_otp: Please enter the verification OTP code.
delete_account.success_soft_desc: Your account has been temporarily hidden. You have 30 days to log back in to recover it. Logging out...
delete_account.success_hard_desc: Your personal data has been anonymized. Logging out...
delete_account.otp_warning: WARNING: This is the final warning. Once you enter the OTP and confirm, your account will be permanently deleted immediately and cannot be recovered!
delete_account.otp_input_label: Enter the 6-digit OTP sent to your Email
delete_account.resend_failed: Unable to resend OTP. Please try again later.
delete_account.soft_warning: Your account will be hidden immediately. You have 30 days to log back in or click the link in the email to restore your account. After 30 days, your account will be permanently anonymized.
delete_account.hard_warning: WARNING: Your account and all personal information will be permanently anonymized immediately. All links will be disabled and cannot be recovered under any circumstances.
